title: Learn Korean with Morning Routine⏱️ Comprehensible Input Vlog

cues.text: Hello everyone The new year has come Happy new year
Today's video is about my morning routine
Let's learn Korean easily
Spread the blanket so that it doesn't wrinkle as much as possible
And spray room spray on the bed
And when I wake up I'm thirsty so I always drink a glass of water
It is said that germs in the mouth are the most common while sleeping
So when I wake up I brush my teeth first
I'll squeeze toothpaste on a toothbrush
I squeezed toothpaste on a toothbrush
I squeezed toothpaste
And I'll brush my teeth with a toothbrush
Wipe the water off your mouth with a towel
And now it's the new year of 2026 so I have a new year's resolution
I woke up every morning and bought this book at the bookstore to study English
It's a book called Kelly's Routine English
I bought this book to make a routine for studying English every morning
So now I'm going to start studying English
I saw somewhere that the brain is activated in the morning
So they say it's good to study in the morning so I'm going to study English in the morning
You're studying Korean too so get up in the morning and study
I'm not sure but I heard it's good to study in the morning
It's also about my morning routine
I wrap myself in a towel before picking up my clothes
I get dressed and then it's finally time for my favorite part of my morning routine
Eating breakfast and drinking coffee I ordered a delivery from a local cafe in my neighborhood

You can order almost everything on a website called Coupang
Like Amazon But the really good thing is that if you order the day before it arrives the next day
Delivery is really fast So it's called rocket delivery So I don't go to the mart myself

I think it's really convenient It's the best I'm going to make a sandwich for breakfast today
First bake the bread in the frying pan

Bake the bread

I cut the tomatoes

I tied the plastic bag

My sandwich recipe is First put basil pesto on the bread
